RA09 – AI-enabled fraud, scams and finan.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR deepfake OR voice cloning OR chatbot OR LLM OR generative AI) (fraud OR scam OR phishing OR impersonation OR money laundering OR mule account OR romance scam OR synthetic identity)

RA11a – Deepfake NCII and synthetic inti.query: (AI OR deepfake OR synthetic media OR generative AI OR nudify) (NCII OR non-consensual intimate OR intimate image abuse OR image-based abuse OR deepfake pornography)

RA11b – Other AI-enabled VAWG behaviours.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR chatbot OR LLM OR generative AI OR voice cloning) (VAWG OR stalking OR harassment OR coercion OR sextortion OR grooming OR violence against women)

RA11c – Child safety and exploitation ri.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR deepfake OR generative AI OR image generator OR LoRA) (child safety OR child exploitation OR grooming OR IWF OR NSPCC)

RA13 – Terrorism, extremism and radicali.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR chatbot OR LLM OR generative AI OR deepfake) (terrorism OR extremist OR extremism OR radicalisation OR radicalization OR terrorist propaganda OR attack planning)

RA14 – Cyber, illegal items and crime en.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR LLM OR generative AI OR agentic AI) (malware OR ransomware OR exploit OR jailbreak OR prompt injection OR weapons OR drugs OR dark web OR cybercrime)

Cross-cutting – Realistic fakes, evidenc.query: (AI OR deepfake OR synthetic media OR generative AI OR voice cloning) (false evidence OR fake document OR fake identity OR border OR immigration OR misinformation OR liar's dividend)
